untranslatable_reason: Signal requires custom measure rule calculation: (candle_height × percentage) applied to breakout_price. The percentage multipliers (92% for upward, 93% for downward) and breakout context detection are not expressible with allowed indicators and operators. Additionally, 'tall candle' definition and breakout direction identification require custom logic unavailable in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Doji pattern detected via body conditions (small body relative to wicks). Entry is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the signal specifies both upward and downward breakout scenarios with different measure rule percentages. Exit conditions use pivot as a neutral reversal point given AUTHOR_SILENT guidance on bear success rate and other parameters. The core measure rule logic (height × 92%/93% applied to breakout price) cannot be translated to the allowed operator set and requires custom implementation.
